face.structure: chiselled with a slightly round chin, prominent cheekbones hinting at a sharp intelligence

eyes.shape: narrow, with a sharp almond shape accentuating a calculating nature
eyes.color: dark brown with flecks of gold
details: contrast between the sclera and iris
subtle highlight on the lower arc
eyes.expression_effect: introspective, often casting a downward glance when inwardly focused

face.expression: set in a thoughtful, neutral manner with a slight furrow in the brow

skin.undertone: warm, with a hint of yellow
skin.texture: smooth with a barely visible matte finish
skin.rendering_notes: subtle gradient shading to accentuate bone structure

hair.style: medium length, layered with soft waves
hair.flow: neatly parted to the left, ends slightly flipping outwards
details: a few stray strands adding to a natural look

character.aura: a calm and controlled presence with an air of mystery

details: a subtle check pattern on the inner lining
outfit.fit: slim fit, accentuates a lanky frame with precise tailoring

composition.pose: standing with hands clasped in front
composition.gesture: head slightly tilted as if listening, body angled subtly to the side

background.details: a blurred map and a softly glowing screen in the background
background.rules: background elements should not distract from the character's focused gaze
